title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
